ideation: This sequence depicts a judge's thoughtful pose, emphasizing deliberation and fairness.  The animation starts with arms at the sides, transitioning to hands steepled, then to one hand resting on the opposite arm, before returning to a neutral position. This conveys a sense of gravity and considered judgment. The subtle movements aim to represent careful consideration rather than dramatic action.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, a moment of quiet contemplation
arms rise and hands steeple, considering the case
right hand rests on left arm, weighing the evidence
arms return to sides, judgment delivered fairly
